title: poa xenica
intro: Poa xenica, also known as the Balkan meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa xenica include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Poa xenica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infuse it in oil to reap its medicinal benefits.
